en: Oh, my gosh. Could I have acted any goofier?
ko: 세상에, 내가 더 바보처럼 행동할 수 있었을까?

en: Not without a set of fake buck teeth.
You're so handsome. I can't work with someone that handsome. No offense.
Oh, none taken. Granted, when it comes to the looks department, Dr. Webber and I aren't exactly in the same...
Species? Well, I was going to say league,
but species is so much more insulting. This stinks! This is total B.S.!
ko: 이건 최악이야! 완전 말도 안 돼!

en: The chicks are all going nuts over this new Webber guy. I'm supposed to be the only sex symbol around here.
ko: 나는 여기서 유일한 섹스 심볼이어야 해.

en: Wait, look at this. Look at this. Come on. Come on, take your best shot.
ko: 잠깐, 이거 봐, 이거 봐. 자, 최선을 다해 봐. 너 말고, 저 남자들 중 한 명.

en: No, no, whoa! Not you. One of those guys. Oh, Bulldog, you're behaving immaturely even for you.
ko: 너 말고, 저 남자들 중 한 명.

en: Granted, the man is handsome, but no reason to feel threatened.
ko: 인정해, 그 남자는 잘생겼지만 위협을 느낄 이유는 없어.

en: I must confess, I didn't notice he was all that handsome.
You didn't notice? You, of all people?
Well, you know, that you're a little, uh...
